title: Classify retryable boundary errors
scenario: Not every failure should be retried. Classification helpers let application code make decisions without string matching.
instructions: Implement is_retryable for CreateOrderUseCaseError. Only Repository(Unavailable) should return true.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps boundary-retryable explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
